meta.title: Stardew Valley Scheduler
meta.description: A cycling 28-day, 4-season calendar notepad for Stardew Valley — stay ahead of festivals, birthdays, and crops.

home.title: Stardew Valley Scheduler
home.subtitle: A cycling calendar notepad — today's tasks and upcoming events at a glance

memo.selectDay: Select a day from the calendar
memo.heading: {season} {day}

weatherFortune.title: Check weather & fortune
weatherFortune.detail: Check tomorrow's weather forecast and the daily luck (fortune) on TV

watering.title: Water crops
watering.detail: Water crops without sprinklers (skip on rainy days)

animalCare.title: Tend animals
animalCare.detail: Pet, feed, and collect produce to keep friendship and quality up

travelingCart.title: Traveling Cart
travelingCart.detail: Fri & Sun, 6:00 AM–8:00 PM / Night Market (Winter 15–17) daily, 5:00 PM–2:00 AM

krobusSprinkler.title: Krobus — Iridium Sprinkler
krobusSprinkler.detail: Friday, buy an Iridium Sprinkler from the Sewers for automation (not on festival days)

desertTraderStaircase.title: Desert Trader — Jade for Staircase
desertTraderStaircase.detail: Sunday, trade Jade for Staircases to prep for the Skull Cavern

specialOrders.title: Special Orders board refresh
specialOrders.detail: Monday, accept new Special Orders at the town and Mr. Qi boards

queenOfSauceNew.title: Queen of Sauce (new episode)
queenOfSauceNew.detail: Sunday — check the new cooking recipe on TV

queenOfSauceRerun.title: Queen of Sauce (rerun)
queenOfSauceRerun.detail: Wednesday — rerun of the cooking recipe on TV

questFestivalWarning.title: Quest deadline warning
questFestivalWarning.detail: Tomorrow is a festival — NPCs and shops are unavailable, so finish help-wanted/delivery quests today

footer.fan: An unofficial fan project, not affiliated with or endorsed by ConcernedApe / Stardew Valley.

footer.code: Source code is available on <repo>GitHub</repo> under the MIT license.
footer.nonCommercial: This site is operated on a non-commercial basis.

gift.birthdayHint: Giving a loved or liked gift on a birthday grants 8x friendship.
